title: Crital
description:
Overhaul Crit chance and Crit damage
and implementation Monster Crit System
(RPG-Like)

Archived : Currently rewriting new one
body:
# Crital
# MOVE TO [DOMINATUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dominatus)

I completely rewrote my old mod from scratch. It now includes built-in critical chance and damage features.  
**I code this mod to play with my friend**. This mod is similar to [TiredZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/tieredz) because, previously, I didn't know how to write data in items
If you want to critical attack maybe this mod can do!
## TD;DR; 
Currently re-write to make it data driven
## Feature
### Grind the item on the Grind table 

- ![grinder table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5be2cba6315dbbeb5195fb8a77bf3b6099983d61.png)


### Recipe Grind Table

- ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/895a759b2ba546c012f897894b49fd4ab081ac78.png)

And Introduce 2 Ingredient for grind the item

![2 w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65ea5d6faa8933e272fa073f73b4698cf527e90.png)

### Recipe Ingredient

- ![Wea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdbd525156134e5d2bcf04aa6f95be6716b2a06e.png)

- ![Ar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e8a3be7a99fa8bda0a4b876a547d248d3fbcf0d.png)

Can you need to put your item into the right slot and else I'll show the request item it only accept only weapon armor
![new](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c68c30e0e18a71429eaa9ceb5d1bcfa22c1ef6f6.png)

Open to see the player stats Key : I ![aaaa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51ccfd7159fc1527d18429b3a923ffa6a7cc4e80_0.webp)


### Monster are now have critical attack
if you play in hard it'll start crit chance at 80-+ I'm not sure how much but it pretty unbalance% and crit damage 150 -+ same% for monster
default normal easy : 5-+ 15% , 50-+ 15% ( I'm not sure how much but it pretty unbalance)

When Critical hit land you'll hear crit attack and see a partcle same as player do
![Crit!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/855bce2a0a61c8ce4039e3e79c3ee18002b901b2.png)

## BUG REPORT
Found bug report here : [Bug Report](https://github.com/MrSypz/ModBugReport/issues/new?assignees=&labels=bug&projects=&template=bug-crash-report.md&title=%28Mod+name%29+Bug%3A+)
## FAQ
**Q: Can I port this mod to (X) loader?**

**A: No.**

**Q: Can you  backport to version 1.x?**

**A: No.** I mod this mod to play with my friend and no reason that good to port back,and I'll update to future version when I want, and I mod like hobby with very limited time

**Q: Can you add this 'xxx' thing**

**A: No.** This mod is only Crit Chance and Damage / maybe adjust some balance in the future or small tweak
if you want more thing don't download this mod go use another instead.

**Q: Can I include this mod in to a modpack?**

**A: Yes.**Go ahead,Please provide credit Modrinth project page.
